claim: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think uses parallel thinking to generate multiple chains of thought simultaneously and then selects the most useful ones
actionable: When using Deep Think models, understand that the long latency before token output is due to parallel chain-of-thought generation being evaluated internally

claim: Deep Think excels on reasoning-heavy tasks like mathematics and logic but has practical limitations for real-time applications due to 10-20+ minute latency
actionable: For production applications, consider splitting workflows: use Deep Think for complex reasoning tasks upfront, then switch to faster models like Gemini 2.5 Pro for implementation

claim: Google DeepMind achieved gold medal standard in the 2025 International Math Olympiad using Gemini 2.5 Deep Think without using specialized mathematical languages like Lean
actionable: Recognize that general-purpose LLMs with deep reasoning capabilities can now compete at expert mathematical levels without domain-specific formal language tools
